search_structure.concepts_inside_or_blocks: Child, adolescent, pediatric, and paediatric terms were kept inside a broad population block.
search_structure.omitted_or_reserve_concepts: Hospitalisation, quality of life, medication adherence, and emergency visits were omitted from the main strategy to protect recall.
search_structure.methodological_filters_or_limits: None. No date, language, species, age, full-text, or publication-type limits were applied.

concepts.name: Asthma
concepts.scope: Condition concept covering asthma and common wheeze wording.

sweep_outputs_and_candidate_sources: Respiratory Sounds rejected after tree/context review because it was too broad for the condition block
details_tree_inspected: Asthma descriptor details and tree context inspected
candidates_rejected: "Respiratory Sounds"[Mesh] rejected because wheeze is a symptom term, not a safe condition descriptor
mesh_review.scr_or_atm_mappings_resolved: No relevant supplementary concept mapping identified.

concepts.name: Self-management education
concepts.scope: Intervention concept covering self-management support, patient education, and educational programs.

sweep_outputs_and_candidate_sources: Self-Management and Health Education descriptors from MeSH sweep
candidates_rejected: "Patient Education as Topic"[Mesh] rejected as redundant after scope review
mesh_review.candidates_deferred_or_reserved: Disease Management was reserved for a focused variant because it retrieved broader service-model records.
mesh_review.scr_or_atm_mappings_resolved: No relevant supplementary concept mapping identified.
mesh_review.entry_terms_omitted: Program* omitted from this block because it was too nonspecific without education or self-management context.

user_decisions.offered_because: Outcome blocks can miss relevant intervention studies that report outcomes inconsistently.
user_decisions.decision: omit from the main high-sensitivity strategy
user_decisions.handling: Outcomes were documented as screening concepts, not mandatory search blocks.

limit_decisions: No date, language, age, species, full-text, or publication-type limits were requested or applied.

decision_ledger.options_considered: Proceed with seeds; proceed without seeds
decision_ledger.evidence_or_test_used: User stated that no known seed PMIDs were available.
decision_ledger.rationale: Validation would rely on MeSH checks, count testing, sample inspection, and final QA rather than known-item recall.

decision_ledger.options_considered: Require outcomes as a separate block; omit outcomes from the main search; reserve outcomes for a focused variant
decision_ledger.evidence_or_test_used: Concept-analysis ledger and high-sensitivity recall risk review
decision_ledger.decision_made: Omit outcomes from the main strategy
decision_ledger.rationale: Outcome terminology is inconsistently reported and would narrow retrieval.

decision_ledger.options_considered: Asthma; Respiratory Sounds; Self-Management; Health Education; Patient Education as Topic
decision_ledger.evidence_or_test_used: MeSH sweep, descriptor details, tree context, and PubMed count tests
decision_ledger.decision_made: Use Asthma, Self-Management, and Health Education as accepted descriptors
decision_ledger.rationale: Accepted descriptors matched the condition and intervention scope; rejected descriptors were redundant or too broad.
decision_ledger.reflected_in: MeSH descriptors considered and final strategy

final_strategy: (("Asthma"[Mesh] OR asthma[tiab] OR wheez*[tiab]) AND ("Self-Management"[Mesh] OR "Health Education"[Mesh] OR self-manag*[tiab] OR "self manag*"[tiab] OR education[tiab] OR educational[tiab]) AND ("Child"[Mesh] OR "Adolescent"[Mesh] OR child*[tiab] OR adolescent*[tiab] OR pediatric*[tiab] OR paediatric*[tiab]))
mesh_derived_from_seed_records: True seed-derived MeSH was not available because no seed PMIDs were supplied.

atm_translations.translation: PubMed ATM mapped asthma and education terms to relevant MeSH and All Fields terms during exploratory checking.
atm_translations.added_explicitly: Yes, relevant MeSH and title/abstract terms were represented explicitly.

tiab_expansion.pre_mesh_brainstorm_required: Brief brainstorm completed because education and self-management terminology varies across records.
tiab_expansion.domain_framing_question_asked: Not needed; adjacent outcome concepts were handled through the concept gate.
brainstormed_vocabulary_families_rejecte: program as a standalone term because it was too nonspecific
brainstormed_vocabulary_families_deferre: disease management reserved for a focused variant
tiab_expansion.seed_derived_tiab_variants_added: not applicable - no seed PMIDs supplied

rationale.mesh_choices: Asthma, Self-Management, Health Education, Child, and Adolescent were selected because they matched the condition, intervention, and population scope.
rationale.text_word_choices: Title/abstract terms cover common spelling, hyphenation, and reporting variants that may appear before or without indexing.
rationale.pre_mesh_vocabulary_domain_choices: Education and self-management were kept broad; outcome terms were not required as separate blocks.
rationale.concept_gate_and_omitted_block_choices: Outcomes and adherence constructs were omitted from the main strategy to protect recall and can be screened after retrieval.
rationale.methodological_filters_or_limits: No methodological filter or limit was used.
rationale.sensitivity_vs_precision: The selected design favours sensitivity, with no focused variant selected for the main audit.
rationale.qa: query_translation_drift: no blocking issues documented; final query hygiene: completed; final-qa: no major recall hazard documented; filter-check: not applicable.

seed_validation.reason_for_misses: not applicable - no seed PMIDs supplied
seed_validation.revisions_made_after_seed_testing: not applicable - no seed PMIDs supplied
seed_validation.seeds_judged_out_of_scope: not applicable - no seed PMIDs supplied

peer_review_attention_points: Confirm whether the education block should include Disease Management for this review question.
Review whether pediatric and adolescent terms should remain mandatory or become screening concepts.
Check wildcard choices for noise before final execution.

reporting_notes.remaining_caveats: No seed PMIDs were available, so known-item recall could not be tested.
reporting_notes.other_databases: Database-specific strategies for other sources were not requested or built.
